_meta.scope: Fake-name cleanup round 6, found during batch-08 prep. Web-verified 2026-07-21.

replacement.name: Nautica My Voyage
replacement.description: Citrus and watery peony over warm amber. The women's answer to Voyage, breezy and easy.
replacement.note: NAME REPAIR: 'Nautica Voyage Pour Elle' does not exist; the real women's product is Nautica My Voyage (2007), verified 2026-07-21. Pyramid sourced from retailer listings (FragranceX, Fragrance Shop).
